productDisplayName: ASICS Women GT 2160 Running White Sports Shoes
description: There are a few shoes with market reference, and the asics GT-2160 is one of them. Packed with features, this is one running shoe every running lover must own.UpperOpen mesh upper promotes maximum breathabilitySynthetic leather overlays supply durable support and help keep the foot securely in place3M reflective elements allow visibility even in low lightLightly padded tongue for added comfortMidsolePHF (Personalized Heel Fit) creates a custom fit as the two layers of memory foam that line the collar mold to your heelComforDry sockliner offers anti-microbial properties for a drier, healthier environmentDuoMax dual-density midsole is specifically positioned for running to enhance support and stabilitySolyte midsole for a supremely cushioned ride and enhanced durabilityOutsoleI.G.S (Impact Guidance System) employs linked component to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike through toe-offRearfoot and forefoot Gel cushioning systems work together to better attenuate impacting shock and allow fluidity of the foot throughout the gait cycleSpace Trusstic System midfoot stabilizer creates a pocket between the Trusstic System unit and the midsole, promoting more controlled midsole deformation, as well as more efficient foot functionGuidance Line technology employs a vertical flex groove that decouples the tooling along the line of progression for maximum stride efficiencyDuraSponge forefoot outsole material is comprised of a blown AHAR (asics High Abrasion Rubber) rubber for superior cushioning and long-lasting wearAHAR heel plug provides excellent durability in this high-wear areaDual-density Solyte 55 lasting utilizes 55 degree density of Solyte lasting material in the heel and forefoot for improved comfortshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
